steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content: The maximum depth is the vertex $(6,302.4)$, so use $g(t)=a(t-6)^2+302.4$. The seal reaches the surface at $t=12$, so $g(12)=0$.

steps.title: Evaluate at t = 10 minutes
steps.content: Evaluate the model at $t=10$: $g(10)=-8.4(10-6)^2+302.4=-8.4(16)+302.4=168$. The estimated depth was 168 meters.
